action.reasoning: Observation: torch_scatter segfaults due to torch 2.11 binary incompatibility. I need to write a pure-PyTorch GNN. Decision: Write custom data utilities (batching, no torch_geometric), custom GIN model with virtual node using only torch.index_add_, train short to validate, then submit eval.
